Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

4RD W91 V2.4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 753
Recv ID: 773
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 23
Func Name: 4WS

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 22625,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IGN Signal"
  },

  {

    "name": "Temperature of ECU (protection mode)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22535,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Temperature of ECU (Failure mode)"
  },
  {

    "name": "CAN - Brake frames absent"
  },
  {

    "name": "CAN - Brake invalid messages received"
  },
  {

    "name": "CAN - ECM frame absent"
  },
  {

    "name": "CAN - BCM frame absent"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22528,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Internal memory - EEPROM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22657,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Abnormal system wake up"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22658,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "System not configured"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22624,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN - 4WS frame absent"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22629,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Actuator stuck ou capteur effet hall"
  }
]

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code constructeur": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code MPR": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Compteur": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Identificateur de Diagnostic": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro de la ligne de production du bloc": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro du bloc  : 0 265": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Semaine de production du bloc": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Systeme Serveur": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

      "aftersales"

    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B1F000000000000",

    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Max difference between RWAOpenLoopRequest sent to ESP and ESP_RWASeen ¤T_RWAMaxGapSeenSent_deg]": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Max number of tolerated overgap between RWAOpenLoopRequest sent to ESP and ESP_RWASeen ¤T_RWAGap_NumberOf_IV_BeforeDM]": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Time where system continues to return to 0 when 1km/h was reached ¤T_TimeOneKmhBeforePowerOff]": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "RWA under which system is considered to be in position 0 ¤T_RWAToAllowPowerOff]": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Max V Speed saturation for models ¤T_U_ms_model_max]": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Min V Speed saturation for models ¤T_U_ms_model_min]": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      }
    }
  },
